text: Breathe. The current moment is the only one you truly have.
Be like water, flowing through every obstacle with grace.
Markets are volatile, but your peace of mind needn't be.
Patience in investing is like a koi waiting for the right ripple.
Koi fish can live for over 30 years with proper care.
In Japan, koi signify luck, prosperity, and good fortune.
Every small splash creates a ripple that can reach distant shores.
Slow steady progress is still progress. Swim on.
Do not seek to follow in the footsteps of the men of old; seek what they sought.
The obstacle is the path. Flow with it.
